positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the provided food still-life frame. Preserve the original wide aspect ratio and composition: empty gray countertop space on the left, wooden cutting board at lower right, bread slice covered with creamy spread and parsley, butter knife resting beside it, whole bun and striped cloth softly blurred in the background. The first frame is already a finished plated bread setup, not an active spreading or slicing scene. During the clip, the small creamy smear on the knife tip and the spread on the bread gently relax under gravity; the surface softens, a tiny edge of cream settles against the bread, and the parsley leaves make one slight natural settling tremble. By the final frames, everything is still again, with the cream smooth and stable. Use very subtle cinematic camera movement: a slow stable minimal drift with gentle parallax, elegant and not distracting. Add only subtle visible natural motion: soft highlights shift across the creamy spread, knife blade, bread crust, and wood grain. Photorealistic, natural soft lighting, realistic colors, realistic physics, smooth temporal consistency, stable object shapes, calm product cinematography.
negative_prompt: Do not show a hand entering, do not lift the knife, do not perform a spreading stroke, do not slice the bread, do not bite the bread, do not pour or add ingredients, do not make the parsley fall off, do not make the bread, board, bun, knife, or cloth slide away, do not melt the cream unnaturally, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing important objects, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, unstable horizon, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled motion, random changes, melting objects, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent object shape, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden object movement, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, plastic texture, text artifacts, logo distortion.
